news.t: BMO Announces Upcoming Splits of Three Series of its Exchange Traded Notes (NYSE Arca: BULZ, SHNY and SPYU)

holdings.infoBox: BULZ is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 9.07%, Advanced Micro Devices at 8.08%, Intel at 7.67%, AppLovin at 6.64%, and Apple at 6.49%.

overview.description: The MicroSectors Solactive FANG & Innovation 3X Leveraged ETN (BULZ) is an exchange-traded note that is based on the Solactive FANG Innovation index. The fund aims to proivde 3x the daily price movements of an equal-weighted index of US-listed technology companies. BULZ was launched on Aug 20, 2021 and is issued by REX Microsectors.
